[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / isRenderingFrame

# Accessor: isRenderingFrame

## Get Signature

```ts
get isRenderingFrame(): boolean;
```

Check if rendering is currently in progress for this frame.

### Returns

`boolean`

### Example
